--- SYSTEM ERROR RAW OUTPUT EXPORT --- 
LOG TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-29 // CLIENT CHANNEL REF: QTE-99211 
------------------------------------------------------------------------ 
hey team here is the pricing estimates you guys requested last week for the upcoming 
infrastructure expansion project at your site. sorry for the delay our quoting system has 
been acting up so im pasting this directly from our internal draft notes pad. 
 
QUOTATION NUMBER ID: #QTE-2026-9921 
DATE OF ISSUANCE: May 28, 2026 
 
SUPPLIER INVOICING/BILLING PARTY: 
Apex Industrial Network Solutions Ltd. 
Registered Corporate Depot: 789 Tech Park, Electronic City, Phase 1, Bangalore, Karnataka, 
India 
Our Corporate Tax Registration No. is 29APEXN8876F1Z2 
For queries reach us at: billing@apexnetworks.co.in 
 
BUYER/CLIENT DELIVER TO PARTY: 
Shree Fab & Infrastructure 
Attn: Purchasing Desk / Project Logistics 
Site location: Gandhinagar, Gujarat, India 
Buyer Registration Tax Identifier (GSTIN): 24SFIFAB9876A1Z0 
 
terms of payment condition: we require 50% advance payment upfront, and the remaining 
balance amount due within Net 15 Days after the installation is completed. 
 
LINE DETAIL ITEMS BREAKDOWN: 
* we can provide 5 units of the Enterprise Grade Network Router switches (we track this 
under product stock code ER-88X). Price per unit is going to be 12000.00 INR. So that row 
total makes 60000.00.  
* next thing you asked for was the Heavy-Duty Cat6 Ethernet Cable Spools. Item tracking 
index index code is CC-102. You guys said you need 12 spools. we can do 1500.00 per spool. 
row total is 18000.00.  
 
SUMMARY FINANCES: 
okay let's sum this up.  
the raw subtotal amount before adding any taxation comes out to exactly 78000.00.  
we have to apply an Integrated GST (IGST) rate charge because of interstate shipping rules. 
The tax amount is exactly 14040.00 (calculated at standard flat eighteen percent rate). 
shipping and handling dispatch transport fees: we will waive this, so it is 0.00. 
deductions/discounts: because you are a returning client we applied a flat special discount 
value reduction of 3000.00 off the final bill.  
no rounding adjustments needed. 
Grand gross aggregate total amount payable value for this layout order proposal: 89040.00 
INR. 
 
validity: this proposal pricing configuration is strictly valid for the next 14 business days only. 
please confirm as soon as possible so we can hold the hardware stock in our warehouse. 
--- ENDOF FILE DUMP ---
